name: Pasta with Caramelized Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the onions into 1.5 cups per person.
2. Heat olive oil in a sauté pan and add the onions, or spray with Pam and cover.
3. Cook on low heat for 45 minutes until the onions are soft.
4. Remove the cover and turn the heat to medium. Continue cooking until all liquid is absorbed.
5. Add salt and pepper generously; continue cooking and stirring until the onions are golden brown. If they stick slightly, reduce the heat a bit.
6. Sprinkle in white wine and stir, scraping up any browned bits from the pan.
7. Turn the heat to high and stir until the wine is completely evaporated.
8. Add fresh parsley (a handful) and toss. Serve over cooked pasta.
9. Season with Parmesan cheese at the table to taste.
Note: Bob prefers a thicker sauce, so you may add cream or tomato sauce, or both, if desired.
